choices.title: Hey there, can you help me get out of here?

choice.title: Who are you?
choice.response: I'm STR_NAME.

choices.title: STR_NAME seems eager to get out.

choice.title: What are you doing here?
choice.response: Those bandits were paid to kill me...

choices.title: STR_NAME mentioned something about bandits.

choice.title: But?
choice.response: But apparently they decided otherwise...

choices.title: STR_NAME mentioned something about a decision.

choice.title: And?
choice.response: And now they hold me here for ransom...

choices.title: STR_NAME mentioned something about a ransom.

choice.title: Go on.
choice.response: Which they will likely never receive...

choices.title: STR_NAME mentioned something about a receiving.

choice.title: Oh?
choice.response: Since the people who could pay them...

choices.title: STR_NAME mentioned something about payment.

choice.title: Uhh?
choice.response: Are the ones that paid them to kill me.

choices.title: STR_NAME mentioned something about his enemies.

choice.title: Is there anything I can do?
choice.response: Well, you could crank the lever and let me out.

choice.title: So, what is it that you do?
choice.response: I'm the Artificer, or master of the Artisans' Guild.

choices.title: STR_NAME told you that he is a guild master.

choice.title: Guild master eh?
choice.response: Great job with good perks and frequent death threats.

choices.title: STR_NAME told you about his work benefits.

choice.title: So, is there anything I can do?
choice.response: Well, you could crank the lever and let me out.

choices.title: STR_NAME mentioned that there's a lever.

choice.title: Oh you mean this lever?
choice.response: That's the one.

choices.title: STR_NAME would like you to crank the lever.

choice.title: Very well then, I'll set you free.
choice.response: Thank you very much!

choice.title: Tell me one thing, what's in it for me?
choice.response: You want a reward for letting me out?

choices.title: STR_NAME seems annoyed by your question.

choice.title: Yes, what is my reward for all this?
choice.response: I can make you an honorary member of the guild.

choices.title: STR_NAME told you about the reward.

choice.title: And what does honorary member mean?
choice.response: You can have items crafted by the artisans.

choices.title: STR_NAME told you about crafting items.

choice.title: Wait, what, you're not offering any gold?
choice.response: Well, there's no point to do that now is there?

choices.title: STR_NAME told you that you're not getting any gold.

choice.title: What do you mean?
choice.response: If you kill me or leave me here you get nothing...

choices.title: STR_NAME told you that you're not getting any gold.

choice.title: And?
choice.response: And you must've cleared the way to reach here...

choices.title: STR_NAME told you that you're not getting any gold.

choice.title: So?
choice.response: So the next guy who walks in would get the reward...

choices.title: STR_NAME told you that you're not getting any gold.

choice.title: Uhh?
choice.response: And since greed often accompanies envy...

choices.title: STR_NAME told you that you're not getting any gold.

choice.title: Ehh?
choice.response: You will set me free whether you want it or not...

choices.title: STR_NAME told you that you're not getting any gold.

choice.title: Why?
choice.response: Because you don't want someone else to benefit.

choices.title: STR_NAME told you that you're not getting any gold.

choice.title: Uhh, fine, I'll get you out of there.
choice.response: Well, thank you.

choice.title: Aaarrgghh, I'll kill you myself!
choice.response: Make it so.

choices.title: STR_NAME is waiting for you to crank the lever.
STR_NAME seems pleased that you let him out.
finish_quest
